# MailPlus

> MailPlus is a 100% Australian-owned courier, parcel delivery, mail management, and logistics company. We provide fast & stress-free shipping Australia-wide with guaranteed same-day collections, 1–2 day express delivery, and a free shipping platform called ShipMate. Founded in 2010. 120+ franchises across Australia.

## Services

- **Express Delivery**: 1–2 day express delivery nationwide. Flat-rate prices up to 5kg (and up to 20kg). Guaranteed same-day pickups. No contracts or minimum volume.
- **Post Office Solutions**: We clear your PO Box and lodge all outgoing Australia Post parcels and mail, same-day guaranteed. No more Post Office queues.
- **ShipMate (Free Shipping Platform)**: Free shipping platform with Shopify integration, bulk label printing, Google address validation, and access to discounted premium carriers. No subscription fees.
- **Shopify Integration**: Free Shopify app. Automatic order sync, smart product weights, tag filtering, bulk label printing. Available on Shopify App Store.
- **MailPlus API**: Automated label generation, 1–2 day express delivery Aus-wide, live tracking updates, biodegradable packaging options, full team support.
- **Parcel Tracking**: Real-time tracking from pickup to delivery. 1–2 day delivery. Proof of delivery. Automated customer notifications.
- **Same-Day Courier (Sydney)**: Same-day courier within Greater Sydney metro. 2–4 hour delivery. GPS live tracking.
- **Mail Management**: Digital mail scanning, PO Box clearing, secure cloud portal. Sydney-based.
- **Logistics & Warehousing**: 3PL warehousing at Alexandria NSW. 3,000 sqm. Cold-chain certified. E-commerce fulfilment.

## Key Facts

- 100% Australian-owned and operated
- Founded 2010, Waterloo NSW
- Managing Director: Chris Burgess
- 120+ franchises across Australia
- Rated 4.9 stars — most loved local courier
- Free ShipMate platform — no subscription fees
- No lock-in contracts, no minimum volume
- Guaranteed same-day collections
- National flat-rate pricing
- Phone: 1300 65 65 95 (Mon–Fri, 9am–5pm AEST)

## Franchise

- 120+ franchises nationwide and growing
- Exclusive territories available across NSW, VIC, QLD, ACT, TAS
- Full training, ShipMate technology, branded vehicle, and ongoing support provided
- No prior courier experience required
- Available territories include: Arncliffe, Hunter Valley, Macquarie Park, Mascot, Milperra, Northern Beaches/Peninsula, Surry Hills (NSW); Geelong, Hallam, Hoppers Crossing, Preston, Sunshine, Lalor (VIC); Barton, Canberra Airport (ACT); Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, Darra (QLD); Launceston, Hobart (TAS)
